component.name: info-card
component.ai_prompt:
When you need to show a titled piece of information (a result, notice, or summary), use the "info-card" component.
Output format:
<$info-card$>
  <Title>short heading</Title>
  <Body>the detail text</Body>
</$info-card$>
Do not omit the outer tags. Parameter names must match exactly.
component.description: Starter component — a titled info card. Replace with your own.
